case_title: LORA BEX LEMPERT VS. AMORE REAL ESTATE INC.

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-21-2015 - JUDGMENT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,000.00 FILED BY LEMPERT, LORA BEX AS TO DEFENDANT AMORE REAL ESTATE INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-21-2015 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - SIGNED SERVED SEP-10-2015, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT AMORE REAL ESTATE INC.
COPYING FEES (10 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF LEMPERT, LORA BEX
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT AMORE REAL ESTATE INC.
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF LEMPERT, LORA BEX AS TO DEFENDANT AMORE REAL ESTATE INC.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-21-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-21-2015 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY JERRY HSECH--VICE PRESIDENT. NO COSTS AWARDED BY COURT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LEMPERT, LORA BEX IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT AMORE REAL ESTATE INC. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
